text: when browser is zoomed in, watchdog response does not get parsed (at least for claude sessions).

status.comment: Confirmed with reproducible automated regression. Added/ran zoom-wrapped-output path tests: (1) busy indicator detection scans recent lines (not only last line), (2) timeout in waitingForResponseStart does not advance without response candidate, and (3) end-to-end tick path executes wrapped newline-in-string JSON after marker into worker prompt. Verified with node --test --import tsx packages/wrapped-agents/codex-session/src/watchdog.test.ts and TypeScript noEmit check for watchdog.ts + watchdog.test.ts.
